name: Papo Vazquez
description: American musician, trombonist, composer, arranger and bandleader
abstract: Angel Rafael "Papo" Vázquez is an American trombonist, composer, arranger, and bandleader of Puerto Rican descent who performs and records jazz, Latin and Afro-Caribbean music. He is known as one of the pioneers of the bomba jazz style and is a Grammy Award nominee.

about_quotes.speaker: Arturo O'Farrill
about_quotes.evidence: the great Puerto Rican valve trombonist Papo Vazquez sat me down and actually had me learn the conga patterns and the timbale patterns
about_quotes.doc_title: Arturo O'Farrill interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 6, 2024
